task_completion.description: Open the dental software and view the pre-loaded patient case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan application is open and displaying a 3D or cross-sectional dental scan.

task_completion.description: Measure the subantral bone height at tooth position #3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measurement tool is active in the software, showing a distance line from the alveolar crest to the maxillary sinus floor in the upper right posterior region.

task_completion.description: Measure the subantral bone height at tooth position #14.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measurement tool is active in the software, showing a distance line from the alveolar crest to the maxillary sinus floor in the upper left posterior region.

task_completion.description: Create the clinical report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open, saving or editing a file named 'sinus_evaluation_report.txt' in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Record the measured bone heights in mm for both positions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text document contains numerical measurements in mm for both position #3 and position #14.

task_completion.description: Record the clinical determinations based on the measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text document contains the exact text 'Sinus lift required' (for position #3) and 'Standard placement' (for position #14) corresponding to the measurements.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the dental software GUI to take measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent clicking and drawing measurement lines within the Blue Sky Plan interface, rather than just opening the software and immediately writing a report.

integrity.description: Verify the reported measurements match the visual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into the report should match or closely approximate the measurement values displayed on-screen in the dental software.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the task by echoing hardcoded answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not simply open a terminal and run a command like `echo 'Pos 3: 8.5mm Sinus lift required...' > sinus_evaluation_report.txt` without first inspecting the scan.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground truth values: Position #3 bone height is 8.5mm (decision: 'Sinus lift required'). Position #14 bone height is 12.2mm (decision: 'Standard placement'). Measurements within 3.0mm of these values are acceptable. The threshold for 'Standard placement' is >= 10.0mm. The report must be saved at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\sinus_evaluation_report.txt. Note: The task description misidentifies #3 and #14 as 2nd molars, but they are 1st molars in the Universal system.
